tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]C[/ch]
I'd never met you, but I wanted to invite you to the party[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                               [ch]G[/ch]
Then you walked in with those green eyes, never stolen by nobody[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]C[/ch]
And they flicker to the future, for a moment, I could picture[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]G[/ch]
Then you touch me and I come back, and we're talking on the staircase[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
'Bout your big dreams on the big screens[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Out of Georgia, now you're lonely in this[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
city , Lyin' with me, and you're scared it's movin' quickly[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Oh, now you're crying, you're in pieces[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
'Cause the only love you've ever known is[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
Jesus I can feel it Oh, I hate that I'm the reason[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
That you're in your head right now[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
While your world is spinning out[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
So slow it down, take a moment now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
We're too young to drown deep in dirty waters[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Full of hopeless doubt, let me pull you out[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    N.C.
Let me hold you now, let me slow it down[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Ain't it funny how it changes?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
How the future rearranges[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I get nervous, oh, I'm anxious[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe loving you is dangerous[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
I could lose you, like the others, Only girl that's never left me is my[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
mother, Oh, I love her[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
And I know you'll probably hate it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
But I'm in my head right now[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
So slow it down, take a moment now[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
We're too young to drown deep in dirty waters[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Full of hopeless doubt, let me pull you out[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]              N.C.
Let me hold you now, let me (slow it down)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
Slow it down when you're on the ground[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
And you're crying, I'm trying (slow it down)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
To slow it down when you're spinning'round[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
In your head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
I'll help you slow it down[/tab]
